DOCX_mixed.note: ONLY docx content extracted; PDF+XLSX silently dropped; all locations generic 'Document'; uniform 0.78 confidence = deterministic fallback

conclusion: Extraction code + fixtures are correct (all formats work in plain Node). Failure is specific to the deployed Next.js server: PDF/XLSX/TXT/CSV extraction throws at runtime; only DOCX (mammoth) survives. In mixed uploads Promise.allSettled swallows the failures so the run still reports 'succeeded' with only docx content and generic citations.
leading_root_cause: Heavy/native parsers (pdf-parse, xlsx) not declared in next.config serverExternalPackages -> bundled by Next -> throw at runtime. TXT/CSV failing on live too is being confirmed via local Next build reproduction.

functional_surface_OK.intake_validation: empty/consent-false/bad-email/1-char-company/missing-required all -> 400; valid -> 200 save; identical resubmit -> noop
functional_surface_OK.negative_tokens: bad token on csv/autonomy/run -> 404; bad-token report -> 404 no data leak
